description:
Implement `hx-progress-bar` (T1-25) — 6/6 enterprise libraries ship this. Linear progress indicator for determinate and indeterminate states.

**Files to create** in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-progress-bar/`:
- `index.ts` — re-export
- `hx-progress-bar.ts` — Lit component
- `hx-progress-bar.styles.ts` — CSS with `--hx-*` tokens
- `hx-progress-bar.stories.ts` — Storybook stories
- `hx-progress-bar.test.ts` — Vitest tests

**Props:** `value` (0-100, or null for indeterminate), `max` (default 100), `label` (string — accessible label), `size` (sm/md/lg — track height), `variant` (`default`|`success`|`warning`|`danger`)

**Slots:** `label` (visible label text above bar)

**CSS Parts:** `base` (outer track), `indicator` (filled portion), `label`

**ARIA:** `role="progressbar"`, `aria-valuenow`, `aria-valuemin="0"`, `aria-valuemax`, `aria-label` from `label` prop. When indeterminate (value=null), omit `aria-valuenow`.

**Animation:** Indeterminate state uses a looping CSS animation on the indicator (`prefers-reduced-motion: reduce` must stop animation).

**Quality gates:** type-check zero errors, all tests pass (determinate + indeterminate), axe-core zero violations (test both modes), Storybook all variants, CEM accurate, bundle < 3KB.

Register in `packages/hx-library/src/index.ts` and `packages/hx-library/vite.config.ts`.
title: IMPLEMENT: hx-progress-bar — T1-25 Linear Progress Indicator
